page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCP1080 or BSOS188A.

BSOS201 Ensuring your Financial Future Through Stock Investing (3 Credits)

Introduces students to investing and trading, with special emphasis

on the field of technical analysis. Planning for one’s financial future

is a critical skill for all students. Students will learn how to evaluate companies using the investors.com website and the TC2000 stock charting program. Students will develop an idea of the risks and benefits of investing, establishing a savings strategy, opening an IRA, and strategically planning for future financial security. In addition to readings, lectures, and online videos, students will participate in virtual stock market trading exercises and manage a virtual account.
